profileInfo.title: Important information
profileInfo.lead: Key rules to know about how the SAYIN GLOBAL platform works.
profileInfo.statusBody:
Every user has an account status:
• Good — no rule violations, no restrictions.
• Warning — minor reports or problematic listings recorded.
• Restricted — listing creation or messaging is temporarily limited.
• Blocked — serious violations, account is blocked.
You can see your status on your profile page.
profileInfo.ratingBody: A rating consists of stars (1–5) and a written review. New accounts start at 0 stars — that's neutral, not untrusted. Only real buyers can leave a rating. A written review is required — ratings without comments are not accepted. Reviews can be translated between the 4 supported languages.
profileInfo.moderationBody: Every new or edited listing goes into "Pending review". A moderator typically approves or rejects within a few hours. If rejected, the reason is shown in the user's interface language (translated to all 4 languages). Editing an active listing automatically sends it back to moderation.
profileInfo.lifecycleBody:
• Active — visible and available for sale
• Sold — marked sold by you, automatically deleted after 7 days
• Rejected — rejected by moderation, automatically deleted after 5 days
• Expired — past 30-day limit, automatically deleted
You can delete your own listing at any time.
profileInfo.complaintBody:
Users can report listings or sellers. A moderator reviews each complaint:
• Valid — the listing is removed and the seller's status is downgraded.
• Invalid — no consequences.
Repeated valid complaints lead to account blocking.
profileInfo.rulesBody:
• Only sell animals you actually own.
• Provide accurate, truthful information in listings.
• Use high-quality, recent photos.
• Communicate honestly and respectfully with buyers.
• Mark sold listings as "Sold".
• Spam, false information, or illegal items are prohibited.

report.successBody: A moderator will review your report and notify you of the outcome.
report.privacyNote: Your identity will not be revealed to the seller.
report.errorOwn: You cannot report your own listing.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We take the security of your personal information seriously. This policy explains what information we collect and how we use it.
privacy.point1: We primarily collect information about your phone number, name, and location.
privacy.point2: Your information is used to improve service quality and display listings correctly by region.
privacy.point3: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.
privacy.point4: The account cannot be deleted, but you can stop using the services and hide your data.
privacy.disclaimer: We use modern security measures to protect your information. However, no information transmitted over the Internet can be 100% secure.
privacy.changesBody: We will notify you of any changes
privacy.dataUsageBody: Data is used to provide services

terms.title: Privacy Policy and Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Official rules for using the SAYIN GLOBAL platform
terms.intro: This document represents an official agreement between users and the SAYIN GLOBAL administration. By using the platform, you agree to all of the following conditions:
terms.point1: All information about the animals put up for sale (health, price, pictures) must be absolutely correct and truthful. False information contradicts the rules of the platform.
terms.point2: Users must maintain respect and mutual trust in communication and trade. Any trade involving fraud or deception is strictly prohibited.
terms.point3: Ads are automatically archived if they are not updated or their status is not changed within 30 days. Sold ads will be deleted within 7 days.
terms.point4: Justified complaints from buyers (e.g., providing false information, deliberately changing the price) will result in the rejection of the ad and a decrease in the user's Health Score.
terms.point5: If a user's trust score (Health Score) drops below 20, their account and all ads will be automatically blocked. Restoration is carried out only through the administration.
terms.point6: The SAYIN GLOBAL platform acts as an information intermediary between the seller and the buyer. The delivery and payment processes for animals are the personal responsibility of the parties.
terms.point7: All personal data, contact numbers and correspondence entered into the platform are strongly encrypted and are not provided to third parties (except as provided by law).
terms.point8: SAYIN administration reserves the right to make changes to these rules without prior notice. Major changes will be announced on the bulletin board.
terms.disclaimer: Disclaimer: We strive to create a safe and reliable ecosystem. We strongly recommend that you inspect the animal before any purchase and use safe payment methods.
terms.checkboxLabel: I have read all the rules and agree to strictly abide by them

aiModeration.title: AI Moderation
aiModeration.allClearDesc: No results need to be reviewed

guidePage.title: Platform Guide
guidePage.healthScoreDesc: On our platform, all sellers start with 100 points. This score indicates your reliability and compliance with the rules on the platform. Your account status is determined based on your score.
guidePage.pointsDeductionDesc: Complaints made by buyers are reviewed by moderators. If a complaint is found to be justified, points are deducted depending on its severity:
guidePage.pointsRecoveryDesc: Lost points can only be recovered through honest trading. For this, the system has a special mechanism to prevent cheating.
guidePage.confirmedSaleDesc: When you mark an ad as "Sold", the system gives you a special hidden code (confirmation code). You give this code to the buyer. When the buyer enters that code into the system, the trade is confirmed and you are automatically given +5 points.
guidePage.goodRatingDesc: If the buyer gives you a 4 or 5 star excellent rating when confirming the purchase, an additional +2 points (total +7 points) will be added. (Your points will not exceed 100).
guidePage.activeRetentionDesc: If not updated within 30 days, they will be automatically archived (taken off sale).
guidePage.soldRetentionDesc: Kept for 7 days, then automatically deleted.
guidePage.rejectedRetentionDesc: Kept for 5 days, then automatically deleted.
guidePage.blockingDesc: If your score drops to 19 or below, your account will automatically be completely blocked and all your ads will be deleted (hidden). It is impossible to get out of the blocked state independently. In this case, you will only have to wait for the Admins' decision or contact the support service.
